pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh which explicitly tests for 'sjohnson'.
Confirmed via export_result.sh which attempts authentication with this exact password.
Confirmed via setup_data.sh which programmatically creates this business and export_result.sh which tests access to it.
Confirmed via setup_manager.sh and setup_data.sh which host and access the Manager.io instance at this URL.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a user account with username 'sjohnson' and password 'Northwind2024!' on the Manager.io server running at http://localhost:8080. The agent must also grant this user access to the procedurally generated 'Northwind Traders' business.
